name: espocrm-ext-geo-spatial
description: Geospatial field type extension for EspoCRM with Leaflet map editing and aggregation panels

scripts.sa: node build --copy && node build --composer-install && php site/vendor/bin/phpstan
scripts.unit-tests: node build --copy && node build --composer-install && cd site && php vendor/bin/phpunit tests/unit/Espo/Modules/GeoSpatial
scripts.integration-tests: node build --copy && node build --composer-install && cd site && php vendor/bin/phpunit tests/integration/Espo/Modules/GeoSpatial
scripts.e2e:packaged:local: npm run e2e:prepare-installed:local && npm run e2e:test
scripts.e2e:packaged: npm run e2e:prepare-installed && npm run e2e:test

author: RegenRate
